hero.title: Research Feed
hero.description: Discover the latest from arXiv, HuggingFace, X, and Xiaohongshu — automatically scored by relevance, recency, popularity, and quality.

status.noActiveSources: No active sources selected. Toggle sources above to see results.
status.noResultsHint: Complete the setup above, then click "Start Search"

steps: Click "Settings" to configure your research domains and keywords
Add arXiv categories (e.g. cs.AI, cs.LG) to filter relevant papers
Adjust "Results to show" and "Max results to scan" as needed
Click "Start Search" to fetch the latest papers
HuggingFace Daily Papers are fetched automatically — no configuration needed
Click "Start Search" to fetch today's trending papers
Optionally add research domains in "Settings" to filter by your interests
Make sure you are logged into X (Twitter) in your browser (Chrome, Arc, Edge, or Firefox)
twitter-cli will automatically extract your browser cookies — no API key needed
Click "Settings" to configure search queries and tracked accounts
Click "Start Search" to fetch the latest tweets
x.note: If you haven't installed twitter-cli yet, run: uv tool install twitter-cli

steps: If you use browser cookies, make sure a browser on the machine running the dr-claw service is logged into xiaohongshu.com
For remote deployments, prefer "Login via QR Code"
Configure your search keywords in Settings
Click "Start Search" to fetch the latest posts
xiaohongshu.note: If you haven't installed xiaohongshu-cli yet, run: uv tool install xiaohongshu-cli

settings.xAuthDescription: twitter-cli automatically extracts cookies from your browser (Chrome, Arc, Edge, Firefox). Make sure you are logged into X/Twitter in your browser. No API key needed.
settings.browserCookieDescription: Extract cookies from a browser on the machine running the dr-claw service. Make sure Chrome, Arc, Edge, or Firefox on that machine is logged into xiaohongshu.com.
settings.serviceMachineHint: This reads browser cookies from the machine hosting the dr-claw service, not from the device where this page is open. If you are using a remote server, prefer QR login.
settings.cookieSourceDescription: If auto-detect fails, choose the browser that is actually installed on the service machine.
settings.cookieSuccessWithName: Cookie extraction successful! Logged in as {{nickname}}
settings.cookieFailure: Login failed. Make sure you are logged into xiaohongshu.com in your browser.
settings.qrLoginDescription: Recommended for remote deployments and Linux environments where browser cookie extraction may fail.
settings.qrFailure: QR login failed. Please try again.
settings.qrRecommendedHint: This looks like a remote-access setup, so QR login is recommended by default. It does not depend on reading browser cookies from the service machine.
settings.searchKeywordsPlaceholder: 大模型, AI论文, 人工智能...
